transcript: Speaker A: എന്റെ കൂടെ English സംസാരിക്കൂ. I say black, you say red. How was your weekend? Oh, a picnic! That sounds lovely. What did you eat? Yummy! And Sunday? What did you do on Sunday? on_screen_text:
എന്റെ കൂടെ English സംസാരിക്കൂ I say black, you say red [Speak English with me. I say black, you say red]
Okay, I understand.
How was your weekend?
My weekend was good, thank you. I went to the park on Saturday with my family. We had a picnic. It was sunny and warm, very nice.
Oh, a picnic! That sounds lovely. What did you eat?
We had sandwiches, some fruit, and potato chips. My sister brought homemade cookies. They were delicious
Yummy! And sunday? What did you do on sunday?
On sunday, I stayed home and studied for my English test. It was a long day, but I think I learned a lot of new vocabulary.
That's good. Studying is important. My weekend was also nice. On saturday, I visited a museum. It was about art, modern art. Some paintings were very interesting.
This was a good practice for me. My vocabulary feels stronger
നമുക്കിത് ഇനിയും ചെയ്യണം. എന്റെ കൂടെ English സംസാരിക്കാൻ പഠിക്കൂ MySivi App ൽ. ഇപ്പോൾ തന്നെ App Install ചെയ്ത് വെറും ഒരു രൂപയ്ക്ക് trial start ചെയ്യൂ. [We should do this again. Learn to speak English with me on MySivi App. Install the app now and start your trial for just one rupee.]
MySivi
summary: An AI avatar demonstrates an interactive English conversation practice feature on the MySivi app. Users can practice speaking by reading the highlighted text. The ad invites viewers to download the app and start a trial for 1 rupee.
